##RRUFFID=R110065
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=KCa_2_(Mg_4_Al)Si_6_Al_2_O_22_F_2_
##LOCALITY=Tranomaro, Fort Dauphine area, Madagascar
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Renato & Adriana Pagano
##DESCRIPTION=Black blocky euhedral single-crystal, from the original find
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110065
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.907 b: 17.953 c: 5.321 alpha: 90 beta: 105.545 gamma: 90 volume: 911.8 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
